channel.title: Linux on Gordon Burgett | Director of Software Engineering, Albers Aerospace
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on Gordon Burgett | Director of Software Engineering, Albers Aerospace

image.title: Gordon Burgett | Director of Software Engineering, Albers Aerospace

item.title: Automating more work
item.description:
So I took a look at my blog recently to make sure everything is working, and got a big fat “Your connection is not secure” message. Uh oh!

Fortunately I just need to request a new certificate from Let’s Encrypt and install it. I’ve done this before, it’s a 10 minute job. Buuuuuttt… what if I could automate it? If I spend all afternoon on this I’ll save myself 15 minutes of work every 3 months! That math totally works out right?
What does the XKCD guy have to say about it?
